creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sylvain Garrigues from comment #15)
> (In reply to Glen Barber from comment #14)
> 
> Hi Glen, like I said in comment #12, you may leave the VMSIZE setting as is
> in the global Makefile.vm and instead add
> 
> export VMSIZE=10240M
> 
> in release/tools/gce.conf
> 
> just like Colin Percival did in release/tools/ec2.conf

What I meant by my comment #14 was ensuring 27GB was in fact a small enough value to end up with an image smaller than 30GB.
